⛮
Platform Workflow Docs GitHub Start

Documentation

Build, operate, and extend Arbiter.

These pages are generated from the repository Markdown so implementation and documentation evolve together.

Getting Started 2 pages covering Getting started, Local Install. Concepts 18 pages covering Agent2Agent (A2A) protocol, Advisor, Artifacts, Authentication. CLI 7 pages covering Arbiter CLI, Outbound A2A, `arbiter --api`, Environment. TUI 7 pages covering Arbiter TUI, Slash commands, Keybindings, Panes. API Reference 71 pages covering Arbiter HTTP API, `GET /v1/a2a/agents/:id/agent-card.json`, `POST /v1/a2a/agents/:id`, `GET /.well-known/agent-card.json`. Philosophy 1 page covering Philosophy.
Arbiter is experimental open-source infrastructure. Philosophy
